completion_assessment: The chat closeout is a completed full Atlas Sunset at the authored-source lifecycle boundary only. The candidate preserves that prime/integrity is the ordinary required logical gate, prime/windows-compatibility is conditional, and validate (ubuntu-latest) and validate (windows-latest) remain temporary migration bridges while the live GitHub ruleset requires them. This candidate is intended to supply the complementary Windows-not-required observation: prime/integrity succeeds, prime/windows-compatibility is skipped, validate (ubuntu-latest) is satisfied, and validate (windows-latest) remains satisfied through its migration-bridge behavior. PR #247 supplied the Windows-required observation. No Quest completion or Covenant acceptance is claimed.
decisions: Treat this as one normal full Atlas Sunset; Prime Ascendant is only the admitted-Quest continuity scope, not a new Sunset type.
Apply ASC-001: prove exactly one new sealed Feather, one immutable Sunset bound to it, and one Sunrise bound to the same Feather/Sunset pair.
Apply ASC-002: observations and successful checks do not self-promote; no Golden Wing is created because recurrence across independent contexts or a justified systemic exception is not established.
Preserve the current Quest position as ACTIVE — ARCHITECTURE REFINEMENT at PA-C01-COVENANT-REFINEMENT with runtime NOT STARTED and no Gitea cutover or legacy route retirement authority.

Keep the eventual ruleset transition separate: observe both Windows-required and Windows-skipped evidence first, then separately authorize new contexts, strict-base behavior, bridge removal, old-context removal, and rollback through reviewed source and settings transactions.
next_approval_gate: Independent exact-head hosted readback and Strikeforce disposition for this draft-PR publication only; any READY, MERGE, generated refresh, ruleset transition, Quest gate advancement, runtime, Gitea, cutover, or route-retirement action requires separate Jayson authority.
next_safe_action: After this draft PR reaches unchanged exact-head hosted proof and independent Strikeforce readback, stop at the draft-PR boundary. If separately merged later, create one separate generated-only refresh transaction from the Sunset merge commit and prove generated CURRENT; do not advance PA-C01 or perform runtime, Gitea, cutover, settings, ruleset, or route-retirement work.
open_items: This Sunset must independently establish the Windows-not-required observation at its unchanged exact draft head: prime/integrity SUCCESS, prime/windows-compatibility SKIPPED, validate (ubuntu-latest) SUCCESS, and validate (windows-latest) satisfied by the conditional migration bridge.
PR #247 already supplied the complementary Windows-required observation; Jayson must separately verify both observations before authorizing any repository ruleset migration.

The separate ruleset transition must retain legacy contexts during observation, verify strict-base behavior, and remove bridge jobs and old required contexts only through later reviewed source and Jayson-controlled settings transactions.

Generated projections are stale after authored PR #247 and this authored Sunset; generated/ remains untouched and requires a separate generated-only refresh transaction after this Sunset is separately merged.
PA-C01 Covenant review remains the next Quest gate; this closeout does not accept the Covenant, advance the Quest, start runtime, activate Gitea, or retire any route.

protected_data.clean_summary: Only sanitized doctrine, public repository identities, merged-PR evidence references, lifecycle state, unresolved work, and restart guidance are included. No credentials, tokens, keys, MFA or recovery codes, private network values, PHI, raw finance or account evidence, private exports, or unredacted logs are stored.
